title: iOS
html:
iOS

Apple's mobile OS — appears across the corpus in two distinct modes: (1) academic study object in the spring 2025 mobile malware / OSU coursework cluster (App Store gatekeeping made iOS a hostile target — only 4 malware samples in the 2009 Felt et al. survey, all in a single month), and (2) build platform for every Yahir-shipped product in 2025–2026 (Brotein, Outpace, IRL Lore, the Swipr PRD).

Chronology

  • 2025-06-01 — Mobile-malware survey (2025 06 01 screenshot 2025 06 01 at 9 15 20 pm 44f00f66, 2025 06 01 screenshot 2025 06 01 at 9 15 26 pm 7f8b8bc5) — iOS-as-study-object
  • 2025-08-09 → 2025-09-12 — Simulator screenshots for brotein and outpace across iPhone 16 Pro / 16 Plus simulators (2025 08 09 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 08 08 at 23 29 54 c694ad0a, 2025 09 12 simulator screenshot iphone 16 plus 2025 09 11 at 22 11 20 7327f1af, 2025 09 03 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 09 03 at 09 48 44 9dd31d21)
  • 2025-02 → 2025-10 — UI iteration screenshots across 2025 02 26 screenshot 2025 02 26 at 2 14 45 pm a7961c54, 2025 03 16 screenshot 2025 03 16 at 6 50 56 pm fe7f3d85, 2025 09 08 screenshot 2025 09 08 at 9 32 34 am b8f00df2, 2025 09 21 screenshot 2025 09 21 at 4 28 05 pm 480c0f7c, 2025 10 09 screenshot 2025 10 09 at 12 16 22 pm 1b46a861, 2025 10 15 screenshot 2025 10 15 at 7 33 50 pm f0a65653
  • 2025-11-15 — Outpace iMessage step tracker — iOS-native iMessage extension as channel
  • 2026-03-04 — Outpace doc polish — iOS PRD final pass

Why it matters

iOS is the default build target of the stealth-apps cluster. The decision (vs Android, vs cross-platform RN) was made implicitly — Yahir uses an M1 Mac, builds in Xcode + SwiftUI, tests on physical iPhones to dodge the Apple Developer fee (2024 12 21 todos). The Brotein paywall stack (revenuecat + App Store Connect) is iOS-native, locking the platform choice in.

Source summaries

  • 2024 12 21 todos — BroMenu iOS spec
  • 2026 03 04 outpace doc polish note
  • 2025 06 01 screenshot 2025 06 01 at 9 15 20 pm 44f00f66
  • 2025 11 15 outpace imessage step tracker
  • 2025 08 09 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 08 08 at 23 29 54 c694ad0a
  • 2025 09 03 simulator screenshot iphone 16 pro 2025 09 03 at 09 48 44 9dd31d21

Connections
